---
id: get-config
title: "Get Config"
description: "Retrieves the **complete device configuration** in a single response — equivalent to calling `get_version`, `get_status`, `get_current_region`, `get_wifi`, `get_eth`, `get_endpoint_config`, and `get_installed_certificate` all at once."
sidebar_label: "Get Config"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api/gen-2-x-api-reference
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Config"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/get_config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieves the **complete device configuration** in a single response — equivalent to calling `get_version`, `get_status`, `get_current_region`, `get_wifi`, `get_eth`, `get_endpoint_config`, and `get_installed_certificate` all at once.

**Response sections:**

| Section | Contents |
|---|---|
| `readerVersion` | Model, serial number, SKU, firmware versions (main, scanner, radio, IoTC) |
| `deviceStatus` | Power source, radio state, temperature, battery health, NTP sync, terminal connection |
| `currentRegion` | Country, regulatory standard, frequency channels, power limits, frequency hopping, LBT |
| `wifiConfig` | Wi-Fi interface status, connected SSID, IP address, MAC, DHCP, security type |
| `ethConfig` | Ethernet interface status, link speed, IP configuration |
| `epConfig` | Active MQTT endpoint: type, broker URL, port, protocol, credentials, topics, security |
| `installedCerts` | List of installed certificates with type, validity dates, and algorithms |
| `eventConfiguration` | Which events/alerts are enabled (heartbeat, battery, temperature, firmware, network, etc.) |

**Typical use cases:**
- First-time setup — see how a blank scanner is configured before applying changes via `set_config`.
- Troubleshooting — get the full picture when something isn't working.
- Auditing — verify all settings across a fleet of scanners.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"command":{"type":"string","example":"get_config","description":"Specifies the operation being performed, in this case, retrieving the complete device configuration."},"requestId":{"type":"string","example":"abc123","description":"A unique identifier for the request, allowing tracking and debugging of the operation."}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"default":{"description":"get_config firmware version of the reader."},"model":{"type":"string","example":"RFD40","enum":["RFD40","RFD90"],"description":"The model of the reader, such as RFD40 or RFD90."},"serialNumber":{"type":"string","example":"23053520102096","description":"The serial number of the reader."},"sku":{"type":"string","example":"RFD4031-G10B700-US","description":"The stock keeping unit (SKU) identifier for the reader."},"companyName":{"type":"string","example":"Zebra Technologies","enum":["Zebra Technologies"],"description":"The company name associated with the reader."},"manufacturerName":{"type":"string","example":"Zebra Technologies","enum":["Zebra Technologies"],"description":"The manufacturer name associated with the reader."},"detailedVersions":{"type":"object","description":"Detailed version information for the reader.","properties":{"scannerFirmware":{"type":"string","example":"PAAEOC20-003-R01","description":"The firmware version of the scanner component."},"radioFirmware":{"type":"string","example":"2.0.42.0","description":"The firmware version of the radio component."},"iotcVersion":{"type":"string","example":"V1.1","enum":["V1.1"],"description":"The version of the IoT Connector (IoTC) software."}}}},"required":["firmwareVersion","model","serialNumber","sku","companyName","manufacturerName"],"description":"Information about the version of the reader device."},"deviceStatus":{"title":"deviceStatus","x-stoplight":{"id":"remoc4mkht8l3"},"type":"object","properties":{"powerSource":{"type":"string","description":"The source of power for the device (e.g., DC, Wall Charger, USB, or Cradle).","example":"CRADLE","enum":["DC","WALLCHARGER","USB","CRADLE"]},"radioActivity":{"type":"string","description":"The activity status of the device's radio (e.g., Active or Inactive).","example":"ACTIVE","enum":["INACTIVE","ACTIVE"]},"radioConnection":{"type":"string","description":"The connection status of the device's radio (e.g., Connected or Disconnected).","example":"CONNECTED","enum":["CONNECTED","DISCONNECTED"]},"hostname":{"type":"string","description":"The hostname of the device on the network.","example":"RFD40-212735201D0053.local"},"systemTime ":{"type":"string","description":"The system time of the device in ISO 8601 format.","example":"2022-07-01T03:01:31.464Z","format":"time"},"temperature":{"type":"integer","description":"The current temperature of the device in degrees Celsius.","example":32},"ntp":{"type":"object","description":"Details about the Network Time Protocol (NTP) synchronization.","properties":{"offset":{"type":"integer","description":"The offset in milliseconds between the device's clock and the NTP server.","example":120},"reach":{"type":"integer","description":"The reachability score of the NTP server.","example":321}}},"terminalConnection":{"type":"object","description":"Details about the terminal connection to the device.","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","description":"The connection status of the terminal (e.g., Connected or Disconnected).","enum":["CONNECTED","DISCONNECTED"],"example":"CONNECTED"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"The type of terminal connection (e.g., Bluetooth, CIO, or USB).","enum":["BLUETOOTH","CIO","USB"]}}},"batteryStatus":{"type":"object","description":"Information about the battery status of the device.","properties":{"mfgDate":{"type":"string","description":"The battery manufacture date.","example":"2024-01-15"},"cycleCount":{"type":"integer","description":"The number of completed battery charge cycles.","example":120},"fullChargeCapacity":{"type":"integer","description":"The current full charge capacity of the battery in mAh.","example":3200},"temperature":{"type":"integer","description":"The battery temperature in degrees Celsius.","example":32},"designCapacity":{"type":"integer","description":"The designed battery capacity in mAh.","example":7000},"batteryType":{"type":"string","description":"The battery chemistry/type.","example":"Li-ion"},"capacity":{"type":"integer","description":"The battery capacity remaining in mAh.","example":5000},"stateOfHealth":{"type":"string","description":"The overall health of the battery (e.g., Good, Average, or Poor).","example":"GOOD","enum":["GOOD","AVERAGE","POOR"]},"chargePercentage":{"type":"integer","description":"The percentage of battery charge remaining.","example":23},"chargeStatus":{"type":"integer","description":"The charging status of the device battery:\n0 - Charger not connected,\n1 - Charger connected and charging in progress,\n2 - Charger connected and battery is 100%.","example":1}}}},"required":["powerSource","radioActivity","radioConnection","hostname","systemTime","temperature"],"description":"Current status details of the device."},"currentRegion":{"title":"currentRegion","x-stoplight":{"id":"380edc8b7805d"},"type":"object","properties":{"frequencyHopping":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether frequency hopping is enabled in the region."},"channelData":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string","example":"\"915250,915750\""},"description":"List of channel frequencies available in the region, represented as strings."},"country":{"type":"string","example":"USA","description":"The country for ehich the device is configured to."},"lbtEnabled":{"type":"boolean","description":"Specifies if Listen Before Talk (LBT) is enabled for the region."},"maxTxPowerSupported":{"type":"number","example":29.2,"description":"The maximum transmission power supported in the region, measured in dBm."},"minTxPowerSupported":{"type":"number","example":"10.0","description":"The minimum transmission power supported in the region, measured in dBm."},"regulatoryStandard":{"type":"string","example":"ETSI_EU_800M_900M_3_CHANNEL","description":"The regulatory standard governing the region's transmission rules."}},"required":["frequencyHopping","channelData","country","lbtEnabled","maxTxPowerSupported","minTxPowerSupported","regulatoryStandard"],"description":"Region information to which the device is currently configured."},"ethConfig":{"title":"ethConfig","x-stoplight":{"id":"jo5vgcsotp2jr"},"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceDetails":{"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceName":{"type":"string","example":"eth0","description":"Name of the network interface."},"status":{"type":"string","example":"enabled","enum":["enabled","disabled"],"description":"Status of the network interface."},"hostname":{"type":"string","example":"RFD40AB03","description":"Hostname assigned to the device."},"macAddress":{"type":"string","example":"E0-D0-45-3D-38-1D","description":"MAC address of the network interface."},"linkStatus":{"type":"object","properties":{"status":{"type":"string","enum":["Connected","Disconnected"],"example":"Connected","description":"Current status of the network link."},"linkSpeed":{"type":"string","example":"100Mbps","description":"Speed of the network link."}},"required":["status","linkSpeed"]},"ipv4Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.81","format":"ipv4","description":"IPv4 address of the network interface."},"subnetMask":{"type":"string","example":"255.255.255.0","format":"ipv4","description":"Subnet mask for the IPv4 configuration."},"gateway":{"type":"string","example":"192.168.1.144","format":"ipv4","description":"Gateway address for the IPv4 configuration."},"enableDhcp":{"type":"boolean","enum":["enabled","disabled"],"example":"enabled","description":"Indicates if DHCP is enabled for IPv4 configuration."},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","example":"192.168.1.78","description":"DNS server address for the IPv4 configuration."},"domainName":{"type":"string","example":"test.soti.com","description":"Domain name for the IPv4 configuration."}}},"ipv6Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","example":"fe80::1643:8376:b32:4a16","format":"ipv6","description":"IPv6 address of the network interface."},"prefix":{"type":"integer","example":"64","description":"Prefix length for the IPv6 configuration."},"gateway":{"type":"string","example":"2a02:1234:420a:100b::99","format":"ipv6","description":"Gateway address for the IPv6 configuration."},"enableAuto":{"type":"boolean","example":true,"description":"Indicates if auto-configuration is enabled for IPv6."},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","example":"2001:4860:4860::9999","format":"ipv6","description":"DNS server address for the IPv6 configuration."},"domainName":{"type":"string","example":"test.soti.com","description":"Domain name for the IPv6 configuration."}}},"security":{"type":"object","properties":{"securityStatus":{"type":"boolean","example":true,"description":"Indicates if security features are enabled."},"EAP802_1X":{"type":"object","properties":{"authentication":{"type":"string","enum":["EAP-MD5","LEAP","PEAP","EAP-SIM","EAP-AKA","EAP-TLS","EAP-TTLS","EAP-FAST"],"example":"PEAP","description":"Authentication method for 802.1X security."},"innerAuthentication":{"type":"string","example":"EAP-MS-CHAPv2","enum":["EAP-MS-CHAPv2"," EAP-TLS","EAP-GTC"],"description":"Inner authentication method for 802.1X security."},"certificate":{"type":"string","example":"client45","description":"Certificate used for 802.1X authentication."}}}}}},"required":["interfaceName","status","hostname","macAddress"]}},"description":"Configuration details for the Ethernet settings of the device."},"wifiConfig":{"title":"wifiConfig","x-stoplight":{"id":"05cf5d5pin81a"},"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceDetails":{"type":"object","properties":{"interfaceName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the network interface (e.g., wlan0).","example":"wlan0"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"The status of the network interface, either \"ENABLED\" or \"DISABLED\".","enum":["ENABLED","DISABLED"],"example":"ENABLED"},"hostname":{"type":"string","description":"The hostname of the device.","example":"RFD40S123"},"macAddress":{"type":"string","description":"The MAC address of the network interface.","example":"E0-D0-45-3D-38-1D"},"accessPoint":{"type":"object","properties":{"essid":{"type":"string","description":"The ESSID (network name) of the access point.","example":"Zwireless"},"status":{"type":"string","description":"The connection status to the access point, either \"CONNECTED\" or \"DISCONNECTED\".","enum":["CONNECTED","DISCONNECTED"],"example":"CONNECTED"},"securityType":{"type":"string","description":"The security type used by the access point.","enum":["WPA2personal","WPA3Personal","WPA2Enterprise","WPA3Enterprise","OWEPublic","Open"],"example":"OWEPublic"},"isPreferred":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether this access point is preferred for connection."},"autoConn":{"type":"boolean","description":"This field is deprecated and kept for backward compatibility."}},"required":["essid","status","securityType","isPreferred"]},"ipv4Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv4 address of the device.","example":"192.168.1.81"},"subnetMask":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","description":"The subnet mask of the network.","example":"255.255.255.0"},"gateway":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv4 gateway address.","example":"192.168.1.144"},"enableDhcp":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates if DHCP is enabled for IPv4 configuration.","example":"enabled"},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","format":"ipv4","description":"The IPv4 address of the DNS server.","example":"192.168.1.78"},"domainName":{"type":"string","description":"The domain name of the network.","example":"test.soti.com"}}},"ipv6Configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"ipAddress":{"type":"string","format":"ipv6","description":"The IPv6 address of the address.","example":64},"gateway":{"type":"string","format":"ipv6","description":"The IPv6 gateway address.","example":"2a02:1234:420a:100b::99"},"enableAuto":{"type":"boolean","description":"Specifies if automatic IPv6 configuration is enabled.","enum":["enabled","disabled"],"example":"enabled"},"dnsServer":{"type":"string","format":"ipv6","description":"The IPv6 address of the DNS server.","example":"2001:4860:4860::9999"},"domainName":{"type":"string","description":"The domain name of the IPv6 authentication method for WPA3-Enterprise.","enum":["tls","ttls","peap"],"example":"tls"},"innerAuthentication":{"type":"string","description":"The inner authentication protocol for WPA3-Enterprise.","enum":["none","tls","mschapv2"],"example":"mschapv2"},"identity":{"type":"string","description":"The identity used for WPA3-Enterprise authentication.","example":"test"},"anonymousIdentity":{"type":"string","description":"The anonymous identity used for WPA3-Enterprise authentication.","example":"test"},"password":{"type":"string","format":"password","description":"The password for WPA3-Enterprise certificates used for WPA3-Enterprise.","example":"ap1wpa2e","items":{"type":"object","maxProperties":4,"properties":{"key":{"type":"string","description":"The type of certificate (e.g., ca_cert, client_key).","enum":["ca_cert","client_key","client_cert","cert_key_password"]},"value":{"type":"string","description":"The value of the certificate."}}}},"protocol":{"type":"string","description":"The protocol used for WPA3-Enterprise.","enum":["WPA3_Enterprise_CCMP","WPA3_Enterprise_CCMP_256","WPA3_Enterprise_GCMP_128","WPA3_Enterprise_GCMP_256_SHA256","WPA3_Enterprise_GCMP_256_SUITEB_192"],"example":"WPA3_Enterprise_CCMP_256","maxLength":3}}},"OWEPublic":{"type":"object","properties":{"authentication":{"type":"string","description":"The authentication method for OWE-Public access."}}}}}},"required":["interfaceName","status","hostname","macAddress"]}},"description":"Configuration details for the Wi-Fi settings of the device."},"installedCerts":{"title":"installedCerts","x-stoplight":{"id":"svr3iljexdwdi"},"type":"object","properties":{"certInfo":{"type":"array","description":"A list of installed certificates with their details.","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the certificate.","example":"Reader Main Certificate"},"type":{"type":"string","description":"The type of the certificate, such as client, server, or other specified types.","example":"server","enum":["client","server"," mqtt"," wifi","filestore"]},"installTime":{"type":"string","description":"The date and time when the certificate was installed.","example":"2022-07-01T03:01:31.464Z","format":"date-time"},"issuerName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the issuer of the certificate.","example":"FX9600EE5729"},"publicKeyAlg":{"type":"string","description":"The algorithm used for the public key.","enum":["RSA256","RSA512"]},"publicKey":{"type":"string","description":"The public key of the certificate in string format.","example":"091234acgbe12"},"serial":{"type":"string","description":"The serial number of the certificate.","example":"410835777"},"subjectName":{"type":"string","description":"The name of the subject to whom the certificate belongs.","example":"FX9600EE572"},"validFrom":{"type":"string","description":"The start date from which the certificate is valid.","example":"2022-07-01","format":"date"},"validTill":{"type":"string","description":"The end date until which the certificate is valid.","example":"2023-07-01","format":"date"}},"required":["type","installTime","issuerName","subjectName","validFrom","validTill"]}}},"description":"List of certificates installed on the device."},"epConfig":{"title":"epConfig","x-stoplight":{"id":"7g3esr6v8nm8y"},"type":"object","properties":{"configuration":{"type":"object","properties":{"endpointName":{"type":"string","example":"MDM","description":"The name of the endpoint, e.g., \"MDM\" for Mobile Device Management."},"epType":{"type":"string","example":"MGMT","enum":["MGMT","MGMT_EVT","CONTROL","DATA","COMMON","SOTI"],"description":"The type of endpoint, specifying its functionality (e.g., Management, Control, etc.)."},"protocol":{"type":"string","enum":["MQTT","MQTTWS","MQT-TLS","MQTT-WSS","TCPIP","WS","WSS","HID","HTTPS","HTTP","AWS","AZURE"],"example":"MQTT","description":"The communication protocol used by the endpoint, such as MQTT or HTTP."},"activate":{"type":"boolean","default":false,"description":"Indicates whether the endpoint is activated (true or false)."},"url":{"type":"string","example":"soti.example.com","description":"The URL of the endpoint, specifying its address."},"verificationType":{"type":"string","example":"VERIFY_HOST_PEER","enum":["NONE","VERIFY_PEER","VERIFY_HOST","VERIFY_HOST_PEER"],"description":"The type of verification to be used for the endpoint connection."},"port":{"type":"integer","example":1883,"description":"The port number used for the connection."},"qosCommon":{"type":"integer","example":1,"description":"The Quality of Service (QoS) level for message delivery."},"tenantId":{"type":"string","example":"ZEBRA","description":"The tenant's unique identifier."},"mqttParams":{"type":"object","properties":{"keepAlive":{"type":"integer","maximum":65535,"example":300,"description":"The keep-alive interval for the MQTT connection."},"cleanSession":{"type":"boolean","default":true,"description":"Indicates whether the MQTT session should be clean (true or false)."},"reconnectDelayMin":{"type":"integer","description":"Minimum delay before reconnecting in case of disconnection."},"reconnectDelayMax":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum delay before reconnecting in case of disconnection."},"clientId":{"type":"string","example":"zebra-rfd40-01","description":"The client ID used for the MQTT connection."},"username":{"type":"string","description":"The username for authenticating the MQTT connection."},"password":{"type":"string","description":"The password for authenticating the MQTT connection."},"publishTopics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"topic":{"type":"string","example":"SOTICONNECT/clients/resp/RFD400124FA","description":"The topic to publish messages to."},"qos":{"type":"integer","example":1,"description":"The QoS level for the published topic."},"retain":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the message should be retained on the broker."}},"required":["topic","qos","retain"]},"description":"A list of topics to which messages will be published."},"subscribeTopics":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"topic":{"type":"string","description":"The topic to which the client will subscribe."},"qos":{"type":"integer","description":"The QoS level for the subscription."},"retain":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the message should be retained."}},"required":["topic","qos","retain"]},"description":"A list of topics to which the client will subscribe."}}},"securityParams":{"type":"object","properties":{"format":{"type":"string","enum":["PEM","PFX"],"example":"PEM","description":"The format of the security certificate (e.g., PEM or PFX)."},"algorithm":{"type":"string","enum":["RSA256","RSA512"],"example":"RSA256","description":"The encryption algorithm used (e.g., RSA256)."},"caCertificateFile":{"type":"string","example":"cloud-trusted-ca-certs.crt","description":"The CA certificate file for establishing trust."},"clientCert":{"type":"string","example":"client_cert.pem","description":"The client certificate file for authentication."},"clientKey":{"type":"string","example":"client_key.pem","description":"The client key file for authentication."}},"required":["format","algorithm","caCertificateFile","clientCert","clientKey"],"description":"Security parameters for the endpoint connection."},"eventConfiguration":{"title":"eventConfiguration","x-stoplight":{"id":"jcezrdndi0i9w"},"type":"object","properties":{"antenna":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable antenna events"},"terminalConnection":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable terminal connection/disconnection events"},"firmwareUpdate":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable fw update events"},"gpi":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable gpi events"},"network":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable network events"},"exceptions":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable exception events"},"ntp":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery alerts"},"userApp":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable user app events"},"heartbeat":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable heart beat"},"power":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable power source alerts"},"battery":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery alerts"},"temperature":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable temperature alerts"},"fileDownload":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable file download alerts"},"cpuUsage":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable cpu usage alerts"},"flashUsage":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable flash usage alerts"},"ramUsage":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable ram usage alerts"},"heartbeatConfiguration":{"type":"object","properties":{"interval":{"type":"integer","example":100,"description":"heart beat interval in seconds"},"inventoryStatus":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable inventory status as part of heartbeat message"},"batteryStatus":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable battery status as part of heartbeat message"},"userApps":{"type":"boolean","description":"set to true to enable user app status as part of heartbeat message"}}},"cpuThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"cpu usage value(%) above which alert will be triggered"},"ramThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"ram usage value(%) above which alert will be triggered"},"flashThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"flash usage value(%) above which alert will be triggered"},"temperatureThreshold":{"type":"integer","description":"temperature treshold value above which alert will be triggered"}},"description":"Reference to the event configuration payload."}},"required":["epType","protocol","activate","url","verificationType","port"]}},"description":"Configuration details for the endpoint settings of the device."},"deviceCapabilities":{"title":"deviceCapabilities","x-stoplight":{"id":"7gxiz1we1sv22"},"type":"object","properties":{"isBluetoothSupported":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the device supports Bluetooth functionality."},"isWifiSupported":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the device supports WiFi connectivity."},"isScannerSupported":{"type":"boolean","description":"Indicates whether the device supports scanner capabilities."}},"description":"Information about the capabilities and features supported by the device."}}},"response":{"title":"response","x-stoplight":{"id":"1uzw0wye4si2y"},"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"integer","example":0,"description":"Response codes:\n\n| Code | Meaning |\n| --- | --- |\n| 0 | Success |\n| 1 | Command payload is accepted |\n| 2 | Invalid payload |\n| 3 | Not able to retrieve information |\n| 4 | Firmware update in progress |\n| 5 | Can't reboot device, inventory in progress |\n| 6 | Region is not configured |\n| 7 | Interface is not available |\n| 8 | Insufficient flash size |\n| 9 | File not found |\n| 10 | Configuration already exists |\n| 11 | Inventory in progress |\n| 12 | No Radio Operation in Progress |\n| 13 | Firmware update Failed |\n| 14 | Battery is low, Cannot update firmware |\n| 15 | WIFI Error - SSID not found |\n| 16 | WIFI Error - Cannot delete active SSID |\n| 17 | WIFI Error - SSID missed |\n| 18 | WIFI Error - SSID already exist |\n| 19 | WIFI Error - SSID count overflow |\n| 20 | Wifi is not supported |\n| 21 | Certificate not found |\n| 22 | Advanced configuration not set |\n| 23 | Invalid enum value |\n| 24 | Max 32 prefilters limit exceeded |\n| 25 | Max 3 publish topics exceeded |\n| 26 | Max 1 subscribe topic exceeded |\n| 27 | Invalid tenant ID length |\n| 28 | Tag match pattern length exceeded |\n| 29 | Url missing for HTTP source |\n| 30 | Certificate content missing for direct source |","minimum":0,"maximum":30},"description":{"type":"string","description":"response description in detail","example":"Success"}},"required":["code","description"]}},"required":["command","requestId","apiVersion","payload"]},"examples":{"Complete device config":{"description":"Response with complete device configuration including all
